subcodes.first_line: In the gathering, Mirza Taqi Khan asked mockingly: "What else remains that is not to be found, whether green or sere, save in the perspicuous Book?" [3.5s]... ...one day Mirza Taqi Khan attended a gathering (presumably in Tihran) at which Baha’u’llah was present.
subcodes.first_line_orig: میرزا تقی خان در مجلس بنوع استهزاء پرسید که دیگر لا رطب و لایابس الا فی کتاب مبین
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @stories; anecdotes
